evidence.description: Ali Ansari is identified as the founder and principal shareholder of Bank Ayandeh, formed through the merger of Tat Bank with other institutions in 2012-2013.

evidence.source_title: Ayandeh Bank: How One Family Built a Bank to Feed Its Own Empire - Zamaneh Media
evidence.description: Detailed investigation into how Ansari created Tat Bank and orchestrated its merger into Ayandeh Bank.
